_comment: PRYZM 2 — S15 medium-project fixture (T8). 500 walls × 5 levels = 2,500 walls. Pre-streaming baseline; the actual streaming gate ships in S16. Schema-shaped (Wall.parse-clean) and grid-laid for deterministic orbit-fps perf runs. The bench rehydrates each wall via Wall.parse(...) to confirm the medium dataset survives a round-trip in pure Node before the renderer is brought online. NOTE: each wall id uses the ULID-shaped wall_<base32-26> form mandated by the protocol Id brand.
